summary: Completed frontend testing for Sala de Juntas mobile day-click fix. Tested mobile (390x844) and desktop (1920x1080) viewports. Mobile fix working correctly: tapping days with reservations opens day list dialog showing reserver names, tapping rows opens detail dialog with 'Reservada por' info, empty days open Reserve modal. Desktop regression mostly passed except Week view slot click issue.

integration_issues.issue: Clicking on a time slot in Week view does NOT open the Reserve modal (expected behavior). Day view and Month view slot clicks work correctly.
integration_issues.details: Desktop regression test: Week view slot click (line 93 in CalendarViews.js) should call onSlotClick with (ds, time) which triggers openReserve, but modal did not open during testing. Day view slot click works fine. Possible causes: event block overlapping, click not propagating, or onSlotClick handler not firing.

passed_tests: MOBILE (390x844): Tapping day WITH reservations opens day-reservations-list dialog with reservation rows
MOBILE: Day reservation rows display reserver name (e.g., 'Dirección Comercial', 'Kevin Admin')
MOBILE: Tapping reservation row opens detail dialog with 'Reservada por' field showing reserver name
MOBILE: Tapping EMPTY day opens Reserve modal (create reservation)
MOBILE: Tapping Monday shows 'Dirección Comercial' locked reservation in day list
DESKTOP (1920x1080): Clicking reservation event chip in Month view opens detail dialog
DESKTOP: Clicking empty day in Month view opens Reserve modal
DESKTOP: Clicking time slot in Day view opens Reserve modal with pre-filled date
DESKTOP: Creating new reservation and verifying it appears in day list with reserver name
All data-testid attributes present: day-reservations-list, day-reservation-row, reservation-detail, day-reserve-button
action_item_for_main_agent: Investigate and fix Week view slot click issue: clicking on empty time slots in Week view should open the Reserve modal but currently does not work. Day view and Month view slot clicks work correctly. Check if onSlotClick handler in WeekView (CalendarViews.js line 93) is being called properly and if event blocks are interfering with click propagation.

success_percentage.desktop: 88% (7/8 tests passed - Week view slot click failed)
